query:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.name,
  c.title,
  c.company,
  c.email,
  c.contactTrustTier,
  c.roleBucket
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
WHERE cp.projectId = 690089
  AND c.crmOrphan = 0
ORDER BY c.contactTrustTier, c.roleBucket, c.name;

FROM contacts c

WHERE cp.projectId = 690089
  AND c.crmOrphan = 0
ORDER BY c.contactTrustTier, c.roleBucket, c.name;
